creator: bruce@toorak.com
text:
Boot Failure - reaches...

fwohcio: fwohci_intr_core: BUS reset
md0: Preloaded image ...
ad0: 114473MB <Seagate ST3120026A 3.06> at at0-master UDMA100
acd0: CDRW <LITE-ON COMBO LTC-48161H/KH0N> at ata1-master UDMA33
GEOM ad0s1: geometry does not match label (255h,63s != 16H,63s).

and it just freezes. This occurs on the Nov 2009 version of FreeBSD 8.0 as well as the April 2010 version.
Nothing proceeds and I tried tricking the software by setting the head/sector counts without success.

Fix: 

Don't mind testing.
How-To-Repeat: Install DVD ISO and boot on ShuttleX
